---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new feature for Journedge
title: "[Feature]"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature you are requesting.

## Problem it Solves

What problem does this solve? What are you currently unable to do?

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you would like this to work. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative approaches? Why did you rule them out?

## Additional Context

Any mockups, examples from other tools, or additional context that would help explain the request.

---

**Note:** For broker CSV support requests, please include a sample of the CSV format your broker exports (with any sensitive data removed).
